caption: Two men are seated in front of a television screen that displays the yellow text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, and the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a thin necklace. Behind them is a wooden shelf holding a collection of DVDs and a small potted cactus. On-screen text includes the handles "@RICKSEGALL" and "@KORBINMILES" beneath each man, respectively, along with a small red "PATREON" logo. Throughout the sequence, the man on the right remains relatively still with his hand resting on his chin. The man on the left is more animated; he begins with a neutral expression, then opens his mouth as if speaking, and later brings his hand up to his chest, gesturing while he continues to talk. The lighting and background remain constant as the men interact within the frame.
